channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Silicon quantum processor achieves full logical operations for the first time - Interesting Engineering
item.description:
1. Silicon quantum processor achieves full logical operations for the first time  Interesting Engineering
  2. Dual-rail superconducting qubits generate high-fidelity logical entanglement, study finds  Phys.org
  3. China team builds first silicon chip for future fault-tolerant quantum computing  scmp.com
  4. Universal logical operations in a silicon quantum processor  Nature
  5. Chinese Researchers Demonstrate Logical Operations on Silicon Quantum Processor  The Quantum Insider

item.title: Cyberpunk 2077 Rival Revealed In Gorgeous New 2027 Game Launch - GAMINGbible
item.description:
1. Cyberpunk 2077 Rival Revealed In Gorgeous New 2027 Game Launch  GAMINGbible
  2. Artificial Detective: Breaking Down the Gameplay Behind This Incredible Xbox Partner Preview Reveal  Xbox Wire
  3. Become A Wise-Cracking Robot Investigating Humanity's Disappearance In Artificial Detective  gameinformer.com
  4. Artificial Detective announcement: a robotic detective in a decopunk future  MondoXbox
  5. I'm unsure how much of a detective game Artificial Detective will be, but I enjoyed the bit in the trailer when your character attacks a robot with a massive drill  PC Gamer

item.title: More Samsung phones get AirDrop support, but there's a catch - SamMobile
item.description:
1. More Samsung phones get AirDrop support, but there's a catch  SamMobile
  2. Samsung Brings AirDrop Support to Quick Share with Galaxy S26 Series  samsung.com
  3. Galaxy S26 phone owners in the U.S. no longer need workarounds to share files with iPhones  PhoneArena
  4. This Samsung Galaxy S26 update makes it ultra-easy to share files with an iPhone  Android Central
  5. AirDrop on the Galaxy S26 is just as quick and easy as I hoped [Gallery]  9to5Google

item.title: Eye drops made from pig semen deliver cancer treatment to mice - Nature
item.description:
1. Eye drops made from pig semen deliver cancer treatment to mice  Nature
  2. Scientists turn pig semen extract into eye drops that kill cancer in mice  Fierce Biotech
  3. Eyedrops made from pig semen help kill cancer in mice: Study | Research published in Science Advances | Inshorts  Inshorts
  4. Eye drops made from pig body fluid could revolutionize cancer treatment, new study says  The News International
  5. Breakthrough Research Identifies Pig Semen Ingredient as Key to Eye Drops That Halt Spread of Cancer  International Business Times UK

item.title: Copper and liquid cooling mods double MacBook Neo performance while cutting temps by 20°C - TechSpot
item.description:
1. Copper and liquid cooling mods double MacBook Neo performance while cutting temps by 20°C  TechSpot
  2. Water Cooling The MacBook Neo Laptop To Double Gaming Performance  Hackaday
  3. MacBook Neo mods include copper and liquid cooling — temps drop and boost performance by up to 18%  tomshardware.com
  4. A MacBook Neo heatsink mod dramatically improves its gaming performance.  The Verge
  5. I played 5 games on the MacBook Neo — here's my report card  Tom's Guide

item.title: Fedora 44 will automatically make your Windows games run faster, no tweaks required - XDA
item.description: Fedora 44 will automatically make your Windows games run faster, no tweaks required  XDA

item.title: Quincy Jones’s Domed Bel-Air Mansion Gets Another Multimillion-Dollar Price Cut - mansionglobal.com
item.description: Quincy Jones’s Domed Bel-Air Mansion Gets Another Multimillion-Dollar Price Cut  mansionglobal.com

item.title: These U.S. States Plan to Offer iPhone's Driver's License Feature - MacRumors
item.description: These U.S. States Plan to Offer iPhone's Driver's License Feature  MacRumors
